title: antirrhinum majus var. tortuosum
intro: Antirrhinum majus var. tortuosum, also known as the twisted snapdragon, is a variety of the flowering plant Antirrhinum majus, characterized by its unique, twisted or curved flower shape. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to the presence of iridoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Antirrhinum majus var. tortuosum include its potential to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
